title: 🪩 Multiform Reflection Beings
name: Multiform Reflection Beings
what_it_is: Entities with no true form—each viewer sees a different reflection based on their mind, a consciousness-adaptive body.
how_to_use: she reflects you—but wrong—her body reshaped by your fears and longing
he’s built from reflected perception—no truth, just meaning bounce
animation_behavior: Form changes depending on who views, shifts with attention and emotion, reflection distorts into personalized shape
